name: Hot Dutch Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Dice the bacon and pan fry until crispy.
2. Add chopped onion and green pepper to the pan. Cook for 3 minutes.
3. Stir in vinegar, salt, pepper, sugar, and beaten egg. Cook briefly.
4. Mix in cubed potatoes, grated carrot, and diced hard-boiled eggs.
5. Blend all ingredients together and serve hot.
Variation: Add chopped apple with the onion and green pepper before cooking.
